calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-29-2009 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-11-2009 Continued To Jul-13-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-19-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Richard S. Johns, Esq. appeared with Naieh Dabis, Successor-in-Interest to plaintiff Anis Yousef Dabis, deceased.
Plaintiff was placed under oath and examined.
George Dabis, a witness for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Aneesh Yousef Dabis (deceased).
Default was entered against defendant on February 11, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on May 6, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Namieh Dabis, Successor-in-Interest to plaintiff Anis Yousef Dabis, and against the Defaulted Defendant Aneesh Yousef Dabis as follows:

Anis Yousef Dabis did not execute the Power of Attorney attached to the Complaint in this action, and Anis Yousef Dabis was not present in the State of Texas at any time in February, 1994 when the Power of Attorney was signed and notarized. Accordingly, the Power of Attorney is and was a forgery, and is void.

Additionally, plaintiff is awarded costs in an amount to be determined.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than May 21, 2009.
